source_meta.source_document: Patient Information Leaflet for Shoulder Joint Replacement

systems.system_notes: Fracture-focused shoulder arthroplasty platform referenced by official J&J MedTech patient information and TGA humeral stem registrations.

components.component_notes: Official TGA device records identify the Global FX humeral stem prosthesis within the fracture system.

unresolved_items.raw_text: Current official source set confirms the system and humeral stem registrations but does not expose a dedicated instrumentation tray description in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper technique or loan-set document pass is required for tray detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Tray detail intentionally left blank rather than guessed.

unresolved_items.raw_text: Current official source set confirms the Global FX stem family but does not expose a full normalized product-code matrix in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper IFU, ordering guide, or implant listing pass is required for product-code detail.
